sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-08-24 10:15
- Distance: 25.1 km
- Moving time: 2:33:36
- Elapsed time: 2:34:43
- Elevation gain: 237.6 m
- Average heart rate: 164.7 bpm
- Max heart rate: 177 bpm
- Average watts: 202.4 W
- Average speed: 9.8 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `12` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `159.9 bpm`, ranging from `106.0` to `171.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `155.5 bpm` and second-half average HR was `164.2 bpm` (+8.7 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `169.4 spm`, with a working range of `141.2` to `175.1 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `169.8 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `169.0 spm` (-0.8 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `6:07 /km` across `25.082 km` in `2:33:36` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:45 /km` and second-half pace was `6:30 /km` (+46 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `164.7 bpm` average and `177 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `165.8 bpm` in the first half and `163.6 bpm` in the second (-2.2 bpm), which reads as broadly stable across the run.

- Moving time was `2:33:36` out of `2:34:43` elapsed (99.3%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `10` stop segments and `1.7%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `306.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.8 m` and `70.2 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `136.6 m` in the first half and `169.6 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
